zh.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort是Jean de Montfort的女兒，於1249年出生在法國。她和Robert IV de Dreux至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1311年3月9日享年62歲。

zh-hans.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort是Jean de Montfort的女儿，于1249年出生在法国。她和Robert IV de Dreux至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1311年3月9日享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort was born in 1249, in France as the daughter of Jean de Montfort. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Robert IV de Dreux. She died on 9 March 1311, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort est née en 1249, à France, fille de Jean de Montfort. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Robert IV de Dreux. Elle est décédée le 9 mars 1311, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort wurde 1249 in Frankreich, als Tochter von Jean de Montfort geboren. Sie hatte mit Robert IV de Dreux mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. März 1311 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort è nata il nel 1249 nel Francia come figlia di Jean de Montfort. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Robert IV de Dreux. Morì il 9 marzo 1311, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfortは1249年にフランスでJean de Montfortの娘として生まれた。彼女はRobert IV de Dreuxとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1311年3月9日に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort(은)는 1249년 프랑스에서 Jean de Montfort의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Robert IV de Dreux(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1311년 3월 9일 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort nasceu em 1249, em França filha de Jean de Montfort. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Robert IV de Dreux. Ela faleceu em 9 de março de 1311, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort родилась в 1249 г. в местности Франция. Её отца звали Jean de Montfort. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Robert IV de Dreux. Она умерла 9 марта 1311 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Comtesse de Dreux Beatrix de Montfort nació en 1249, en Francia como hija de Jean de Montfort. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Robert IV de Dreux. Murió el 9 de marzo de 1311, a la edad de 62 años.
